title: Set up Supabase Storage for File Uploads
summary: Create a Supabase Storage bucket, configure RLS policies, generate signed upload URLs server-side, build a Next.js upload API route and client component, and serve files via public or signed URLs.
declaration: I will set up Supabase Storage for file uploads. This covers creating a storage bucket, configuring Row Level Security (RLS) policies, building a server-side upload API route using signed URLs, and a client-side upload component. I will NOT skip RLS configuration or expose the service-role key to the browser. Tell me whether the bucket should be public or private before I begin.
